wafv2.webacl.overrideaction.CfnAbout: The action to use to override the `Action` settings on the rules in the web ACL. You can use none, in which case the rule actions are in effect, or count, in which case, if a rule matches a web request, it only counts the match.

wafv2.webacl.overrideaction.Count.Description: Override the rule action settings to count.

wafv2.webacl.overrideaction.None.Description: Don't override the rule action settings.
